escalation.rationale: US-Iran ceasefire has collapsed with both sides exchanging fresh airstrikes, Trump reinstating the Hormuz blockade, and Iran's IRGC targeting US bases with missiles, while the Ukraine front sees continued Russian offensive pressure and a Ukrainian drone mass-strike on Azov Sea shipping.

ticker_items: Trump declares Hormuz blockade reinstated after fresh US-Iran strike exchange.
Iran IRGC fires missiles at US bases; CENTCOM confirms 140 targets struck in Iran.
Ukraine drones hit 11 Russian vessels in Azov Sea overnight.
EU adopts largest-ever cyber sanctions package against Russia — 8 individuals, 4 entities listed.
Ukraine PM resigns; Zelenskyy oversees cabinet shake-up amid ongoing war.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones struck 11 Russian vessels in the Azov Sea overnight, targeting tankers, dry cargo ships, and a tugboat.

middle_east.description: US CENTCOM reported strikes on 140 targets inside Iran as part of renewed offensive operations following ceasefire collapse.
Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps launched missile strikes targeting US military bases in the Gulf region in retaliation for American airstrikes.

today.incident: US-Iran renewed strikes — Iran deaths (cumulative tracker)
US-Iran conflict — Gulf states deaths (cumulative tracker)
Russian forces daily losses — Ukraine front (claimed)

claimed_totals.claim: Iranian civilian and military deaths since Operation Epic Fury
Lebanon deaths since US-Israel operations began

ukraine.text: Ukrainian forces have battled Russian troops to near stalemate, and Ukrainian drones are inflicting pain at the pump for Russian drivers.
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Iran is not going to capitulate.
middle_east.speaker: Jeremy Scahill
middle_east.title: Journalist/Analyst, Democracy Now!

middle_east.text: The ceasefire between the United States, Israel and Iran was 'over.'
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: President of the United States

middle_east.text: Today, it is dictating the terms of the peace.
middle_east.speaker: War on the Rocks analyst
middle_east.title: Analyst, War on the Rocks

observers.description: The US is conducting active offensive air operations against Iran, having struck 140 targets. Trump reinstated the Strait of Hormuz blockade following renewed Iranian missile attacks on US bases. Domestic political landscape shifted with the death of Senator Lindsey Graham, a key Trump foreign policy supporter.

The EU adopted its largest-ever cyber sanctions package against Russia on July 13, listing eight individuals and four entities. EU Foreign Ministers met in Brussels to discuss continued support for Ukraine, Black Sea security, and the Middle East situation. The EU also coordinated with the UK on additional Russia cyber sanctions.

The UK joined the EU in imposing new sanctions on Russia over alleged cyberattacks, highlighting continued Western coordination. UK Maritime Trade Office confirmed a cargo vessel attack in the Red Sea near Houthi-controlled Yemen.

Iran's IRGC launched missile strikes against US bases in the Gulf following renewed American airstrikes, effectively ending the ceasefire framework agreed in June. Iran faces internal exhaustion and contradictory political signals amid ongoing emergency measures. Analyst reporting suggests Iran believes it is in a position to dictate peace terms despite military asymmetry.

Reporting indicates North Korea is supplying approximately 40% of Russia's artillery ammunition. China and North Korea marked the 65th anniversary of their friendship treaty, with Xi Jinping urging both nations to maintain 'strategic resolve' amid global turmoil.

Xi Jinping urged China and North Korea to maintain strategic resolve amid global turbulence. China continues to observe the US-Iran conflict and NATO posture without direct intervention, maintaining its position as a strategic balancer.

Turkey hosted the NATO Ankara summit on July 7-8, producing a minimal six-point declaration criticised as kicking the can down the road. Erdogan's Turkey continues to leverage its NATO position while maintaining independent diplomatic channels.

Poland faces internal political controversy after reports emerged that a former Polish minister is allegedly aiding Russian troops, raising concerns about the cohesion of Polish support for Ukraine. Poland continues its broader NATO commitment and Ukraine support posture.

financial.notes: Trump's reinstatement of the Strait of Hormuz blockade following renewed US-Iran hostilities is expected to exert significant upward pressure on global crude prices, with Brent crude sensitive to any prolonged disruption of Gulf shipping lanes.

update_log.text: Trump declares Hormuz blockade reinstated after US and Iran trade new waves of airstrikes.
War on the Rocks analysis: Iran assessed to be 'dictating terms of peace' despite US military superiority after 19 weeks of conflict.
War on the Rocks analysis: Russian force expansion in Ukraine characterised as 'return to mass,' highlighting quantitative approach with emerging limitations.
Al Jazeera reports Ukraine drone strike hit 11 Russian vessels in the Azov Sea overnight, forcing Russia to plan export rerouting.
Al Jazeera confirmed: US-Iran ceasefire in shambles with both sides conducting tit-for-tat attacks, raising risk of all-out war.
EU adopts largest-ever cyber sanctions package against Russia — 8 individuals and 4 entities listed at Foreign Affairs Council.
Ukraine Prime Minister resigns; Zelenskyy managing cabinet shake-up amid continued battlefield stalemate.
Democracy Now reports IRGC launched missile strikes targeting US bases after CENTCOM confirmed 140 targets struck inside Iran.
Al Jazeera cumulative tracker: ~3,468 dead in Iran, ~3,696 in Lebanon, ~28 in Gulf states since Operation Epic Fury began Feb 28.
Senator Lindsey Graham died of aortic dissection; DC Medical Examiner issued preliminary findings on cause of death.
NATO Ankara summit assessed by analysts as having 'kicked the can down the road' with only a minimal six-point declaration.
